# Pacelio — East Africa's Courier & Logistics Platform
> Connect businesses, courier agents, and logistics companies across East Africa. Real-time tracking, multi-carrier rate comparison, instant booking, and seamless delivery management.

## About
Pacelio is a courier and logistics platform built by IncriprTech, headquartered in Mbeya, Tanzania. It serves as a multi-carrier marketplace connecting businesses, individual users, courier agents, and logistics companies across East Africa.

## Key Features
- Multi-carrier rate comparison — compare prices from multiple couriers in real time
- Live tracking — GPS-based real-time parcel tracking
- QR handoffs — secure QR code-based proof of delivery
- Route optimization — AI-powered delivery route planning
- In-app chat — direct communication between senders and couriers
- Cash on Delivery (COD) — end-to-end COD management with automated reconciliation
